languages.text: "Причудливый рисунок акустических волн. Никогда раньше не сталкивался с подобным". {n}Эоганн кажется совершенно безмятежным и даже заинтересованным, явно вслушиваясь во что-то.{/n} "Инфразвук перемежается с ультразвуком, при этом столь естественно... Эти частоты неслышимы, Вольный Торговец, но вызывают бурную реакцию со стороны глубинных структур человеческого мозга. Мне бы хотелось лицезреть их источник".

"A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deep-seated structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."
languages.original_text: "Причудливый рисунок акустических волн. Эти частоты неслышимы, Вольный Торговец, но вызывают бурную реакцию со стороны глубинных структур человеческого мозга. Мне бы хотелось лицезреть их источник".

traits.locale_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

"A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued, as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternates with ultrasound, so naturally... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the reptilian brain in our heads. I wish to see their source."

These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

languages.text: «Una pauta peculiar de ondas acústicas. No había visto nada parecido antes». {n}Eogunn parece completamente sereno, incluso intrigado, y escucha algo atentamente.{/n} «Infrasonidos alternando con ultrasonidos de forma extremadamente natural... Las frecuencias son inaudibles, Comerciante Independiente, pero desatan una reacción violenta en las estructuras más profundas del cerebro humano. Me encantaría ver su origen».
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: «Una pauta peculiar de ondas acústicas. No había visto nada parecido antes». {n}Eogunn parece completamente sereno, incluso intrigado, y escucha algo atentamente.{/n} «Infrasonidos alternando con ultrasonidos de forma extremadamente natural... Las frecuencias son inaudibles, Comerciante Independiente, pero desatan una reacción violenta en las estructuras más profundas del cerebro humano. Me encantaría ver su origen».

languages.text: “一种奇特的声波模式。我从未遇见过这种现象。”{n}伊奥贡专注地聆听着什么，神情异常平静，甚至带着几分兴趣。{/n}“次声波与超声波交替出现，而且如此自然……这些频率本身无法被听见，行商浪人，但它们却会引发人类大脑深层结构的强烈反应。我很想看看这声波出自哪里。”
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: “一种奇特的声波模式。我从未遇见过这种现象。”{n}伊奥贡专注地聆听着什么，神情异常平静，甚至带着几分兴趣。{/n}“次声波与超声波交替出现，而且如此自然……这些频率本身无法被听见，行商浪人，但它们却会引发人类大脑深层结构的强烈反应。我很想看看这声波出自哪里。”

languages.text: "Ein seltsames Muster akustischer Wellen. Ich bin so etwas noch nie begegnet. {n}Eogunn wirkt absolut gelassen und fasziniert, als er jemandem aufmerksam zuhört.{/n} "Infra- und Ultraschall im Wechsel, noch dazu so natürlich ... Diese Frequenzen sind unhörbar, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, und doch lösen sie eine heftige Reaktion in den Tiefen des menschlichen Gehirns aus. Ich würde gerne ihren Ursprung sehen."
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: "Ein seltsames Muster akustischer Wellen. Ich bin so etwas noch nie begegnet. {n}Eogunn wirkt absolut gelassen und fasziniert, als er jemandem aufmerksam zuhört.{/n} "Infra- und Ultraschall im Wechsel, noch dazu so natürlich ... Diese Frequenzen sind unhörbar, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, und doch lösen sie eine heftige Reaktion in den Tiefen des menschlichen Gehirns aus. Ich würde gerne ihren Ursprung sehen."

languages.text: « Une fréquence particulière d'ondes acoustiques. C'est la première fois que je rencontre un tel phénomène. » {n}Eogunn semble parfaitement serein et même intrigué tandis qu'il écoute attentivement quelque chose.{/n} « Une alternance d'infrasons et d'ultrasons d'un tel naturel... Ces fréquences sont inaudibles, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, mais elles provoquent une réaction violente des structures les plus profondes du cerveau humain. J'aimerais examiner leur source. »
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: « Une fréquence particulière d'ondes acoustiques. C'est la première fois que je rencontre un tel phénomène. » {n}Eogunn semble parfaitement serein et même intrigué tandis qu'il écoute attentivement quelque chose.{/n} « Une alternance d'infrasons et d'ultrasons d'un tel naturel... Ces fréquences sont inaudibles, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, mais elles provoquent une réaction violente des structures les plus profondes du cerveau humain. J'aimerais examiner leur source. »

languages.text: "Akustik dalgaların tuhaf bir modeli. Daha önce hiç böyle bir şeyle karşılaşmamıştım." {n}Eogunn, dikkatle bir şeyi dinlerken son derece sakin ve hatta meraklı görünüyor.{/n} "Ultrason ile ardışık gelen infrason, üstelik o kadar doğal ki... Bu frekanslar duyulamaz Hür Tacir, yine de insan beyninin en derin yapılarından şiddetli bir tepki uyandırıyorlar. Kaynaklarını gözlerimle görmek isterim."
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deepmost structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: "Akustik dalgaların tuhaf bir modeli. Daha önce hiç böyle bir şeyle karşılaşmamıştım." {n}Eogunn, dikkatle bir şeyi dinlerken son derece sakin ve hatta meraklı görünüyor.{/n} "Ultrason ile ardışık gelen infrason, üstelik o kadar doğal ki... Bu frekanslar duyulamaz Hür Tacir, yine de insan beyninin en derin yapılarından şiddetli bir tepki uyandırıyorlar. Kaynaklarını gözlerimle görmek isterim."

languages.text: 「奇妙な音波の模様。これまでに見たこともない。」{n}エオグンは穏やかな表情で、何かを真剣に聞いています。{/n}「超音波と超低音波が交互に発生している。自然な現象なのだろう。これらの周波数は人間には聞こえないが、脳の爬虫類脳に激しく反応を誘発する。その源泉を見たい。」
languages.original_text: "A peculiar pattern of acoustic waves. I have never encountered anything like this before." {n}Eogunn appears utterly serene and even intrigued as he listens intently to something.{/n} "Infrasound alternating with ultrasound, and so naturally too... These frequencies are inaudible, Rogue Trader, yet they evoke a violent reaction from the deep-seated structures of the human brain. I would like to lay eyes on their source."

traits.locale_text: 「奇妙な音波の模様。これまでに見たこともない。」{n}エオグンは穏やかな表情で、何かを真剣に聞いています。{/n}「超音波と超低音波が交互に発生している。自然な現象なのだろう。これらの周波数は人間には聞こえないが、脳の爬虫類脳に激しく反応を誘発する。その源泉を見たい。」
